productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Striped White Polo T-shirt
description: Composition White polo T-shirt with blue and red stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a striped, ribbed, spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, applique on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery An effortless way to tap into this spring's hottest colour trends, this T-shirt form arrow is a versatile piece. We suggest that you style this with classic, fitting denims and a denim jacket that is one tone lighter than your trousers. Wear this with casual shoes the experimental at heart can pair this with boat shoes with the jeans cuffs rolled up. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
